input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8367 [Automation] native-image run fails for com.sksamuel.hoplite:hoplite-core:3.0.0.RC1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Hoplite documentation examples often use YAML/JSON/TOML/HOCON files, but those formats require optional hoplite-* parser modules; core itself can be meaningfully tested with MapPropertySource, built-in Java properties support, classpath resources, default decoders, environment/system-property sources, and preprocessors.

Version 3.0.0.RC1 updates Kotlin dependencies to 2.1.0 and changes environment-variable property-source behavior, so native-image failures are more likely metadata/reflection related than missing external setup.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: hoplite-core is usable with its resolved transitive Kotlin/coroutines dependencies and built-in property sources; no Docker image, external service, extra Maven dependency, environment variable, or system property is required for meaningful core coverage.
